findings.description: timeAgo() duplicated in 5 files (health/page.tsx, clusters/[id]/page.tsx, alerts/page.tsx, events/page.tsx, PodDetailSheet.tsx). Extract to shared util.
Uptime History section is hardcoded placeholder (all green bars). Consider hiding or marking as 'Coming Soon' to avoid misleading users.
Health page component health matrix shows same icon for all components per cluster (no per-component granularity). If backend doesn't provide per-component data, the UI misleads.
Cluster detail compact stat cards lost border/bg styling compared to overview tab's richer cards — visual inconsistency.
Dashboard events feed uses array index as key (`ev-${i}`). If events reorder, React reconciliation may be wrong. Use event id if available.

issues: MEDIUM: timeAgo() duplicated across 5 files — extract to shared util (apps/web/src/lib/time-utils.ts)
LOW: Uptime History is hardcoded placeholder — mark as 'Coming Soon'
LOW: Health component matrix lacks per-component granularity
LOW: Cluster detail stat cards visual inconsistency vs overview tab
LOW: Dashboard events feed uses array index as React key
